name: Elsa School Bus-Miami
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword searches for ELSA, ELSA SCHOOL, and ELSA SCHOOL BUS returned no carrier in Miami, FL matching this name (~50 ELSA-named carriers found, none are school bus operators in Miami). No USDOT number located — operator is likely an intrastate, school-only private bus operator licensed by Miami-Dade County PTRD (not FMCSA). Sunbiz searches via Google found no Florida corporation named ELSA SCHOOL BUS; entity may be a fictitious/DBA name or registered under an owner's personal name. A Facebook page (Elsa School Bus, Miami FL) exists confirming the business operates as a school transportation service. Address per input: 3118 NW 1st St, Miami, FL 33125.

name: Kinnicutt Bus Inc
notes: FMCSA SAFER confirms KINNICUTT BUS INC, USDOT 967181, active, intrastate-only NY carrier — power units & drivers not reported in MCS-150 snapshot. Operating address per FMCSA is 2 Elmwood Rd, Menands, NY 12204 (immediately adjacent to Albany; input address 9 Cornell Dr, Albany 12204 is in the same Menands/north Albany area — likely same operator, address variant). NY DOS records show domestic business corp formed 12/14/1981, DOS ID 699069, status Active; CEO Donna Keny. Company involved in 1999 NTSB-investigated Albany City School field-trip crash. Fleet size likely small-mid (typical for a 40+ year intrastate school bus contractor).
